town.translate: город, городок, местечко, городской, превращать в город

examples.eng: I walked around town.
I hear he's leaving town.
examples.ru: Я слышал, что он уезжает из города.

examples.eng: I caught a bus into town.
examples.ru: Я сел на автобус, идущий в город.

examples.eng: He tore off into town.
She lives way out of town.
I thumbed a lift into town.
the town of Jackson, Florida
It is in the center of town.
a town not far from Chicago
She moved to a smaller town.
This town is jinxed.
Take Route 2 into town.
examples.ru: Поезжайте в город по второму шоссе.

examples.eng: The news ran all over town.
examples.ru: Это известие быстро распространилось по всему городу.

examples.eng: He lives in a nearby town.
The town now lay in ruins.
The road leads back to town.
examples.ru: Эта дорога ведёт обратно в город.

examples.eng: The town became a speck.
The army seized the town.
The town is very touristy.
The town is close at hand.
examples.ru: Город — совсем рядом, на расстоянии вытянутой руки.

examples.eng: The town peopled very fast.
The planes strafed the town.
The enemy pillaged the town.
This town likes to regulate.
examples.ru: В этом городе любят всё контролировать.

examples.eng: render the town to the enemy
He rode his cycle into town.
examples.ru: Он поехал в город на своём велосипеде /мотоцикле/.

examples.eng: Invaders ransacked the town.
They were heading into town.
I bumped into my ex in town.
examples.ru: В городе я наткнулся на свою бывшую.

examples.eng: I had a light lunch in town.
